meta.title: The Night Ledger
meta.sub: Hauntings, creatures, and uneasy ground of Southeast & East Asia: collected, catalogued, kept.
meta.epigraph: Some stories are told to frighten children. These are kept to remind the rest of us that the dark was here long before we built our lights against it.
meta.epigraphSource: From the Keeper's note, entry I
meta.footer: The Night Ledger · kept after dark

sections.title: Apocrypha
sections.intro: Tales without a clean source: half-remembered, second-hand, or invented outright at the keeper's hand and told as though they had always been here. Read this section as fiction, and keep one eye on the dark anyway.
